nasb.text: so that the manifold wisdom of God might now be made known through the church to the rulers and the authorities in the heavenly places.

esv.text: so that through the church the manifold wisdom of God might now be made known to the rulers and authorities in the heavenly places.

cnv.text: 為了要使天上執政的和掌權的，現在藉著教會都可以知道　神各樣的智慧。

ccb.text: 目的是为了透过教会让天上的执政者和掌权者现在可以看出上帝丰富的智慧。

csbs.text: 为要使天上的统治者和掌权者，如今藉着教会能明白神各种各样的智慧。
